# 8.2 Bill Analysis Profiles

Defines prompt profile catalog for bill analysis: composition of instruction blocks, stage ordering, weights, and initial block set. Profiles and blocks stored in GCS — this defines the **contract** (what exists and composition), not prompt text itself.

## Profile Catalog

### Decomposition Profiles

Used by bill-analysis-pipeline (Component 10) during text decomposition for large bills.

#### `concept-simplification`

Simplifies grouped bill sections into coherent summary.

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Persona | `general-audience` | 0.9 | Plain language output |
| Context | `concept-group-text` | 1.0 | Placeholder: `{{concept_group_text}}` — grouped sections to simplify |
| Guardrails | `nonpartisan-constraint`, `accuracy-constraint` | 1.0 | Bias prevention |
| Output | `concept-summary-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema for concept summary |

**Input:** Bill text subset (one concept group).  
**Output:** Concise summary preserving key provisions, dollar amounts, affected parties, policy mechanisms.

#### `section-classification`

Classifies bill section by topic/policy area for concept grouping.

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Context | `section-text` | 1.0 | Placeholder: `{{section_text}}` — individual section |
| Output | `topic-classification-schema` | 1.0 | Matches `TopicClassificationOutput` (Component 1 §1.6) |

**Input:** Single section/provision.  
**Output:** Topic tags with confidence scores for section grouping.

### Analysis Profiles

Used by bill-analysis-pipeline for three-pass tiered analysis.

#### `pass1-extraction`

Structured extraction, topic classification, plain language summary. Runs on all bills (Haiku tier).

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Persona | `general-audience` | 0.9 | 8th-grade reading level |
| Lens | `policy-area-classifier` | 0.8 | Topic/policy area classification |
| Context | `bill-concepts`, `amendments` | 1.0 | `{{bill_concepts}}` = simplified summaries or raw text; `{{amendments}}` = amendment descriptions |
| Guardrails | `nonpartisan-constraint`, `accuracy-constraint` | 1.0 | Bias prevention, factual accuracy |
| Output | `pass1-extraction-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema: summary + topics + key points |

**Output schemas:** `BillSummaryOutput` + `TopicClassificationOutput` (Component 1 §1.6).

#### `pass2-deep-analysis`

Deep analysis: pork detection, impact analysis, stance classification, fiscal estimates. Runs on filtered bills (Sonnet tier).

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Persona | `expert-audience` | 0.8 | Technical/detailed output |
| Lens | `fiscal-lens`, `civil-liberties-lens`, `pork-detector` | 0.8 | Multiple analytical lenses (additive) |
| Context | `bill-concepts`, `amendments`, `pass1-results` | 1.0 | `{{bill_concepts}}`, `{{amendments}}`, `{{pass1_results}}` = Pass 1 output |
| Guardrails | `nonpartisan-constraint`, `accuracy-constraint` | 1.0 | Bias prevention |
| Output | `pass2-deep-analysis-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema: pork + impact + stance + fiscal |

**Output schemas:** `PorkDetectionOutput` + `ImpactAnalysisOutput` + `StanceClassificationOutput` + `FiscalEstimateOutput` (Component 1 §1.6).

**Multiple lenses:** Lens stage supports multiple blocks; each adds analytical focus. `ChainAssembler` (Component 1 §1.7) merges into single stage section. Stage weight applies to all lenses equally.

#### `pass3-ambiguity-resolution`

Ambiguity resolution and cross-bill analysis. Runs only on flagged bills (Opus tier).

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Persona | `expert-audience` | 0.9 | Detailed, nuanced output |
| Lens | `ambiguity-resolver`, `cross-reference-analyzer` | 0.9 | Cross-document reasoning |
| Context | `bill-concepts`, `amendments`, `pass1-results`, `pass2-results`, `related-bills` | 1.0 | All prior analysis + related bills |
| Guardrails | `nonpartisan-constraint`, `accuracy-constraint` | 1.0 | Bias prevention |
| Output | `pass3-resolution-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema for ambiguity resolution |

### Utility Profiles

Targeted analysis (not part of standard three-pass flow).

| Profile | Purpose | Blocks |
|---------|---------|--------|
| `summary-only` | Plain language summary only | System + Persona(general) + Context(bill-concepts) + Output(summary-schema) |
| `pork-detection` | Targeted pork/rider scan | System + Persona(expert) + Lens(pork-detector) + Context(bill-concepts) + Output(pork-schema) |

---

## Block Catalog

All blocks stored in GCS as YAML files. This catalog defines the **contract** — block names, stages, purposes. Actual prompt content lives in GCS.

#### System Stage

| Block Name | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| `base-legislative-analyst` | Core system prompt: analyst role, capabilities, behavioral baseline |

#### Persona Stage

| Block Name | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| `general-audience` | 8th-grade reading level; avoids jargon |
| `expert-audience` | Technical/detailed; assumes policy expertise |

#### Lens Stage

| Block Name | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| `policy-area-classifier` | Topic and policy area classification with confidence scores |
| `fiscal-lens` | Fiscal impact: budgets, revenue, CBO-style estimates |
| `civil-liberties-lens` | Civil liberties and constitutional implications |
| `healthcare-lens` | Healthcare policy impacts |
| `pork-detector` | Earmarks, riders, unrelated provisions |
| `ambiguity-resolver` | Identifies and resolves ambiguous/contradictory provisions |
| `cross-reference-analyzer` | Cross-bill interaction analysis |

#### Context Stage

Placeholders replaced at runtime by `BillContextInjector` (§8.3).

| Block Name | Placeholder | Content |
|------------|-------------|---------|
| `bill-concepts` | `{{bill_concepts}}` | Simplified concept summaries or raw text |
| `concept-group-text` | `{{concept_group_text}}` | Single concept group for simplification |
| `section-text` | `{{section_text}}` | Single section for classification |
| `amendments` | `{{amendments}}` | Amendment descriptions |
| `related-bills` | `{{related_bills}}` | Related bill summaries (cross-bill analysis) |
| `pass1-results` | `{{pass1_results}}` | Pass 1 extraction results |
| `pass2-results` | `{{pass2_results}}` | Pass 2 analysis results |

#### Guardrails Stage

| Block Name | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| `nonpartisan-constraint` | Prohibits partisan language, party opinions, political recommendations |
| `accuracy-constraint` | Requires factual citations, distinguishes fact from interpretation, flags uncertainty |

#### Output Stage

| Block Name | References Schema |
|------------|------------------|
| `concept-summary-schema` | Concept group summary (decomposition) |
| `topic-classification-schema` | `TopicClassificationOutput` (§1.6) |
| `pass1-extraction-schema` | `BillSummaryOutput` + `TopicClassificationOutput` (§1.6) |
| `pass2-deep-analysis-schema` | `PorkDetectionOutput` + `ImpactAnalysisOutput` + `StanceClassificationOutput` + `FiscalEstimateOutput` (§1.6) |
| `pass3-resolution-schema` | Ambiguity resolution output |

---

## Block Versioning

- Block filenames: `{blockName}-v{major}.{minor}.{patch}.yaml`
- Profiles reference blocks by name — version resolved at load time by `BlockLoader` (§8.1)
- Block updates create new versioned file; old versions preserved in GCS
- `BillPromptEngineConfig.defaultVersion` (§8.1) determines loaded version unless overridden

## Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| Every profile in catalog has valid YAML definition in test fixtures | Load each profile → deserializes to `PromptProfile` |
| Every profile references only existing blocks | Cross-reference profile `blockNames` against catalog → no missing refs |
| Every block has `stage` matching its directory | Block in `lens/` → `stage == Lens` |
| All context blocks have exactly one placeholder token | Each context block contains exactly one `{{...}}` |
| `concept-simplification` assembles in correct order | Assemble → System, Persona, Context, Guardrails, Output |
| `section-classification` has no Persona or Lens | Assemble → no Persona/Lens content |
| `pass1-extraction` includes all required stages | Assemble → System, Persona, Lens, Context, Guardrails, Output |
| `pass2-deep-analysis` includes multiple lenses | Assemble → Lens section contains fiscal, civil-liberties, pork-detector |
| `pass2-deep-analysis` includes `pass1-results` context | Profile chain → Context includes `pass1-results` |
| `pass3-ambiguity-resolution` includes prior results | Profile chain → Context includes `pass1-results` and `pass2-results` |
| Utility profiles valid | Load → deserializes correctly |
| No duplicate block names | Block catalog audit → all unique |
| No duplicate profile names | Profile catalog audit → all unique |
| All weights in 0.0-1.0 range | Inspect all weights → valid |
